364 J1800_FALL_LAST_ASMT_CD J1800_FALL_LAST_ASMT_CD J1800 Falls Since Admission or Prior Assessment Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had any falls since admission/entry or reentry or the prior assessment (OBRA or Scheduled PPS) which ever is more recent. -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
365 J1900A_FALL_NO_INJURY_CD J1900A_FALL_NO_INJURY_CD J1900A Number of Falls Since Admission or Prior Assessment With No Injury Code
